steps.description: Click the language selection icon (flag and "lp" text) in the bottom left corner of the Visual Studio Code welcome screen to open language options.
Click the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" item in the EXPLORER panel of Visual Studio Code to select or open the toolkit folder.
Click the "Welcome" tab in the workspace area of Visual Studio Code, indicated by the red crosshair at the top center of the editor interface.
Click the "View Samples" button in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit welcome panel within Visual Studio Code.
Decrease editor zoom level in Visual Studio Code's "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" Samples gallery by pressing Ctrl + - (minus).
Click the grid view icon in the "Samples" section of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code to change the sample display layout.
Click the "Search" input field in the "Samples" tab of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension within Visual Studio Code.
